name: get_thread
trigger_description:
Use this tool when:
Complete thread context is required
The user asks to review or summarize an email thread
Preparing replies, follow-ups, or handoffs based on a thread
Understanding decisions, commitments, or shared materials across messages
Do not use this tool when:
Only a single message is required (use get_message)
The thread ID is unknown (use search_threads to identify the appropriate thread, or search_messages when starting from a specific email)
